user_query: Child has some messy lunches that won't pack well for school - delete a few options that sounds hard to transport or eat cleanly.
nodes_to_delete: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 3 > Lunch > Bean Burrito Bowl — Berry Boost Style
Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 7 > Lunch > Soba Noodle Bowl — Garlic-Ginger Wrap
reasoning: I selected the Burrito Bowl and the Soba Noodle Bowl as they contain loose ingredients (rice, beans, salsa) and liquid dressings that are difficult for a child to eat cleanly and prone to leaking during transport. I excluded the Salmon Wrap and Veggie Quesadilla as handheld wraps/quesadillas are generally considered the most 'packable' and clean-to-eat school lunch options. The Teriyaki Chicken Bowl was also excluded as it is a more stable, cohesive meal compared to the loose components of the burrito bowl.
